prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约756→656→572→1194→888，整体呈波动走势。2024年因新高考选科调整出现较大后移（1194名），2025年明显回升至888名，近两年波动幅度较大；本省理科/物理类计划2021年31人、2022年29人、2023年29人、2024年28人、2025年22人，呈逐年小幅缩减趋势；2026年计划22人，与2025年持平，计划稳定。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年第17名，近年排名稳定在Top20，属国内顶尖高校层次；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及师德师风与校园安全话题，但整体关注度有限；抖音热度排名第44（较热），短视频曝光量中等；未见明显投档断档记录；拥有15个A-及以上学科，其中理论经济学A+、应用经济学A+、法学A+、社会学A+、统计学A+、工商管理A+、新闻传播学A+、马克思主义理论A+等，人文社科领域实力全国顶尖；理科招生专业中统计学A+、计算机科学与技术A、物理学A-等对理科生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理科相关专业2026年热度持续高热推荐；统计学、数学等基础学科也属推荐方向；本省2026年考生总数474900，按近年比例估算物理类约267800人，较2025年（266425人）略有增加，竞争小幅加剧；省控线方面，物理类本科批2025年429分低于2024年448分，特殊类型控制线2025年505分低于2024年520分，整体分数线有所下降；中国人民大学位于北京，对本省考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在本省招生占比约2.5%–3.5%，属中等偏低水平，地域偏好对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次2025年回升至888名的基准、2026年招生计划与2025年持平、本省物理类考生总数略有增加、人大理科专业（统计学、计算机等）社会热度较高但学校声誉偏负面等因素，预计2026年最低位次在2025年基础上小幅前移（竞争略加剧）；预测最低位次约878名，区间773–983名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category fluctuated: 756 → 656 → 572 → 1194 → 888, showing an overall volatile trend. In 2024, due to adjustments in new Gaokao subject selection, there was a significant drop (1194th place), but in 2025 it rebounded to 888th place, with large fluctuations in the past two years. The provincial enrollment plan for science/physics category was 31 in 2021, 29 in 2022, 29 in 2023, 28 in 2024, and 22 in 2025, showing a gradual decreasing trend. The 2026 plan is 22, unchanged from 2025, indicating stability.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 17th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the Top 20 in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving topics of teacher ethics and campus safety, but overall attention is limited. Douyin popularity ranks 44th (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure. No obvious enrollment gaps recorded. It has 15 disciplines rated A- or above, including Theoretical Economics A+, Applied Economics A+, Law A+, Sociology A+, Statistics A+, Business Administration A+, Journalism and Communication A+, Marxist Theory A+, etc., with top national strength in humanities and social sciences. Among science enrollment majors, Statistics A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Physics A- are highly attractive to science students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, computer-related, electronic/information/communication, electrical engineering and other science-related majors continue to be highly recommended. Basic disciplines like statistics and mathematics are also recommended directions. The total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is 474,900, with an estimated 267,800 in the physics category based on recent proportions, a slight increase from 2025 (266,425), intensifying competition slightly. Regarding provincial control lines, the physics category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 429 points, lower than 2024's 448 points; the special type control line in 2025 was 505 points, lower than 2024's 520 points, showing an overall decrease in score lines. Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, with strong cross-provincial appeal to local examinees. Its enrollment proportion in this province is about 2.5%–3.5%, moderately low, with limited impact of regional preference on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the baseline of the 2025 ranking rebounding to 888th, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, a slight increase in the total number of physics category examinees in the province, high social popularity of Renmin University's science majors (statistics, computer, etc.) but somewhat negative school reputation, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will move slightly forward from 2025 (competition slightly intensifies). Predicted minimum ranking: approximately 878th, with a range of 773–983.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range (773–983), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 composite majors (finance + technology, economics + data science) as the main direction, with Tier 1 flagship majors (statistics, artificial intelligence, computer science) as reach options, and Tier 3 basic discipline majors as safety choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<773), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 125→97→102→95→114, fluctuating narrowly within the 95–125 range. In 2025, the ranking shifted back by about 19 places compared to 2024, with a cumulative shift back of about 12 places over the past three years. The provincial enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category was 33 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 26 in 2023, 27 in 2024, and 34 in 2025, with a significant expansion in 2025. The 2026 plan is 40 students, an increase of 6 (+17.6%) over 2025, indicating a substantial expansion that eases competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 17th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the Top 20 in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics and campus safety topics. Douyin popularity ranking is 44th (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure. No obvious enrollment gaps recorded. It has 15 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Theoretical Economics, Applied Economics, Law, Sociology, Business Administration, Journalism and Communication, and Chinese Language and Literature, as well as A in Philosophy and Political Science. Its strength in humanities and social sciences is top nationally, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the popularity of Renmin University's flagship majors such as Law, Finance/Economics shows a divergent and wait-and-see trend. Law is highly competitive but with stable social demand, while Finance/Economics require high university level. Journalism and Communication is notably discouraged. The total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is 474,900, with an estimated history category of about 207,000 based on recent proportions, slightly higher than 2025 (206,055). For the provincial control line, the history category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 486 points, higher than 2024's 463 points; the special type control line in 2025 was 539 points, higher than 2024's 532 points, indicating an overall rise in score lines. Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, which strongly attracts cross-provincial candidates. Its enrollment proportion in this province is about 2.5%–3.5%, moderately low, with limited impact of regional preference on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline of the 2025 ranking at 114, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 17.6% (+6 students), a slight increase in the total number of history category candidates in the province, Renmin University's top-tier liberal arts majors but somewhat negative reputation, the downward effect of expansion on ranking (ranking number increases) slightly outweighs the upward effects from increased candidates and reputation. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift back slightly compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 130, with a range of 80–180.
